_comment: OpenAI cost controls and usage guardrails for Modern Content Platform v1. Canonical reference: app/src/utils/openaiConfig.js OPENAI_COST_CONTROLS. See docs/architecture/openai-cost-controls.md for the full guide.

preFilter._comment: Applied before items reach the AI classification step. Set AI_MAX_ITEMS_PER_BATCH in n8n variables to override maxItemsPerBatch at runtime.

maxTokens._comment: Hard cap on OpenAI completion tokens per call. Maps to maxTokens in each n8n OpenAI node.

dailyCallBudgets._comment: Informational soft limits on AI calls per topic per day. Not enforced automatically — use these as alerting thresholds in your monitoring dashboard.

outputLimits._comment: Maximum character lengths enforced by the validation Code node after each AI call.
